title: Coles Flybuys
body:
O.P.
http://www.theage.com.au/bus iness/coles-opens-new-front- in-supermarket-wars-20120419-1x8s8.html
Looks like there will finally be a loyalty program worth using, as Coles has just announced some changes to Flybuys and will be mailing out over 8 million cards to nearly every household in Australia.
My favourite part is 'My5', which apparently lets you choose 5 products of your choice from a list and get 10% off them. You also get one point for every dollar spent. Sounds pretty good to me and way better than current Flybuys or Everyday Rewards. What do people think?
